name: llmoxie-sandbox-walkthrough
description: Get Started walkthrough for the LLMoxie NAIRR RSE sandbox.

walkthroughs.title: LLMoxie RSE Sandbox
walkthroughs.description: Select a model, verify the gateway, and start the research loop.

steps.title: Environment ready
steps.description:
The devcontainer already prepared everything: the pixi Python environment, the LLMoxie Model Provider extension, and the Copilot CLI wired to the gateway.
Check this step off and move on.

steps.title: Select a UW SSEC model
steps.description:
Open Copilot Chat, click the model name next to the input box, expand "Other Models", and pick a UW SSEC entry.
[Open Copilot Chat](command:workbench.action.chat.open)

steps.title: Verify the gateway
steps.description:
Run the verification task — it checks the gateway connection and the UW SSEC models, with a clear pass/fail in the terminal.
[Run verification](command:workbench.action.tasks.runTask?%22verify-gateway%22)

steps.title: Try your first prompt
steps.description:
Send one prompt to confirm the whole stack end-to-end.
[Open Copilot Chat](command:workbench.action.chat.open)

steps.title: Start the research loop
steps.description:
Pick a guided deck. Each opens via Quick Open — press Enter to open the file, then use "Open Preview to the Side".
[Open packaging deck](command:workbench.action.quickOpen?%22research-loop.md%22)
[Open ocean deck](command:workbench.action.quickOpen?%22research-loop-ocean.md%22)
